title: Lively Crunchy Argentinian Beef Wrap
description: A bitter and crunchy brunch dish featuring seared beef, spicy vegetables, and a fresh lotus leaf wrap.
instructions: In a bowl, combine beef strips with chili powder, smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and 1 tbsp rendered beef fat; toss until coated.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat; sear beef for 2-3 minutes per side until browned and cooked to medium; set aside.
In the same skillet, add remaining rendered beef fat and sauté shredded carrots, diced bell pepper, and thinly sliced onion for 5 minutes until crisp-tender.
Add lime juice and chopped cilantro to the vegetables, cook for 1 minute; remove from heat.
Warm lotus leaf sheets in a damp cloth for 5 minutes until pliable.
Divide the sautéed vegetable mixture evenly onto each lotus leaf, topping with the seared beef.
Fold the lotus leaves into wrap shape, securing with kitchen twine or a toothpick if needed.
Place the wrapped bundles on a baking sheet; bake at 180°C for 8 minutes to seal the edges.
Remove from oven; let rest 2 minutes; optionally drizzle with a small amount of rendered beef fat.
Slice each wrap into bite-sized pieces and serve immediately.
